articles.author: Josh Funk, Mike Stobbe
articles.title: Quarantine comes to an end for the last of the hantavirus ship passengers in Nebraska - AP News
articles.description: The last eight Americans who endured 42 days in a specialized hospital quarantine unit after exposure to an unusual hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship that killed three people have left the Nebraska facility. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services off…
articles.content: OMAHA, Nebraska (AP) The last eight American passengers who endured 42 days in a specialized hospital quarantine unit after exposure to an unusual hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship that killed thr… [+5710 chars]
